text: {"acknowledges_specifics":true,"no_unverifiable_promise":false,"states_next_steps":true,"invents_no_policy":true,"consistent_with_gold":false,"within_length":true,"justification":"It addresses both weekend ACH timing and sport-specific P&L, stays concise and avoids inventing policy, but it promises a follow-up the agent can’t verify and fails to provide the P&L guidance requested in the gold notes."}
